recommendations.title: Shooting Stars
recommendations.overview: A young Hungarian dreams of playing for the French football team and will get the help of a couple of friends.

recommendations.title: All Inclusive
recommendations.overview: A man goes on an all-inclusive vacation to the Caribbean and finds out he must share his room with someone else.

recommendations.title: The Book Thief
recommendations.overview: While subjected to the horrors of WWII Germany, young Liesel finds solace by stealing books and sharing them with others. Under the stairs in her home, a Jewish refugee is being sheltered by her adoptive parents.

recommendations.title: My Policeman
recommendations.overview: In the late 1990s, the arrival of elderly invalid Patrick into Marion and Tom’s home triggers the exploration of seismic events from 40 years previous: the passionate relationship between Tom and Patrick at a time when homosexuality was illegal.

recommendations.title: You'll Never Find Me

recommendations.title: If I Were a Rich Man
recommendations.overview: A man which wife is filing to divorce him wins 25 million EUR in the lotto, hiding her to prevent sharing the half of the prize.
